english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

O you wrapped up in your mantle!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Rise up and warn!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Magnify your Lord,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

and purify your clothes,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

and keep away from all impurity!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Do not grant a favour seeking a greater gain,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

and be patient for the sake of your Lord.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

When the Trumpet will be sounded,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

that will be a day of hardship,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

not at all easy for the faithless.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Leave Me [to deal] with him whom I created alone,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

and furnished him with extensive means,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

[gave him] sons to be at his side,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

and facilitated [all matters] for him.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Still he is eager that I should give him more.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

No indeed! He is an obstinate opponent of Our signs.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Soon I will overwhelm him with hardship.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Indeed he reflected and decided.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Perish he, how he decided!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Again, perish he, how he decided!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Then he looked;
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

then frowned and scowled.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Then he walked away disdainfully,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ
english translation text:
saying, ‘It is nothing but traditional sorcery.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

It is nothing but the speech of a human.’
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Soon I will cast him into Saqar.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

And what will show you what is Saqar?
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

It neither spares, nor leaves [anything].
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

It burns the skin.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

There are nineteen [keepers] over it.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: وَمَا جَعَلْنَا أَصْحَابَ النَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَائِكَةً ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ وَيَزْدَادَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِيمَانًا ۙ
english translation text:
We have assigned only angels as keepers of the Fire, and We have made their number merely a stumbling block for the faithless, and so that those who were given the Book may be reassured, and the faithful may increase in [their] faith,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: وَلَا يَرْتَابَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ الَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَالْكَافِرُونَ مَاذَا أَرَادَ اللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًا ۚ
english translation text:
and so that those who were given the Book and the faithful may not be in doubt, and so that the faithless and those in whose hearts is a sickness may say, ‘What did Allah mean by this description?’
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللَّهُ مَن يَشَاءُ وَيَهْدِي مَن يَشَاءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِيَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ
english translation text:
Thus does Allah lead astray whomever He wishes and guides whomever He wishes. No one knows the hosts of your Lord except Him, and it is just an admonition for all humans.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

No indeed! By the Moon!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

By the night when it recedes!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

By the dawn when it brightens!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Indeed they are one of the greatest [signs of God]
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

—a warner to all humans,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: لِمَن شَاءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
english translation text:
[alike] for those of you who like to advance ahead and those who would remain behind.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Every soul is hostage to what it has earned,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

except the People of the Right Hand.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

[They will be] in gardens, questioning
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

the guilty:
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

‘What drew you into Hell?’
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

They will answer, ‘We were not among those who prayed.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

Nor did we feed the poor.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

We used to indulge in [profane] gossip along with the gossipers,
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

and we used to deny the Day of Retribution
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

until death came to us.’
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

So the intercession of the intercessors will not avail them.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

What is the matter with them that they evade the Reminder
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

as if they were terrified asses
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

fleeing from a lion?
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ امْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً
english translation text:
But everyone of them desires to be given unrolled scriptures [from Allah]!
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

No! Indeed, they do not fear the Hereafter.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

No! It is indeed a reminder.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

So let anyone who wishes be mindful of it.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One

arabic text: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ التَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَةِ
english translation text:
And they will not be mindful unless Allah wishes. He is worthy of [your] being wary [of Him] and He is worthy to forgive.
Al Muddaththir – The Cloaked One
